items.title: Four Questions About The Iran War That Deserve Clear, Consistent Answers
items.description: We’re more than a week into the Iran war and yet we have no clear or consistent objectives, no theory of victory.

items.title: No Matter How The Iran War Ends, We Absolutely Cannot Take Any Refugees
items.description: Allowing zero refugees to resettle on American soil should be the absolute minimum requirement for any U.S. military action in the Middle East.

items.title: New York Magazine’s Latest Anti-Child Propaganda Misses The Point Of Parenthood
items.description: Maybe, just maybe, sacrificing self to cultivate a legacy and life that goes beyond LinkedIn and the landfill is the point.

items.title: Brazil Threatens Citizens With Years In Prison For Saying Men Aren’t Women
items.description: Isadora Borges, a Brazilian veterinary student, faced trial last month for a post stating 'trans women are not women.'

items.title: California Voter ID Ballot Measure Offers Roadmap For Enacting Common-Sense Policies In Blue States
items.description: Conservatives should do more to leverage initiatives and referenda to enact popular policies over the objections of Democrat politicians.
